prose.en: Identify and explicitly authorize users allowed to independently configure wireless networking capabilities.

guidance.en: Organizational authorizations to allow selected users to configure wireless networking capabilities are enforced, in part, by the access enforcement mechanisms employed within organizational systems.

prose.en: users allowed to independently configure wireless networking capabilities are identified;
users allowed to independently configure wireless networking capabilities are explicitly authorized.

objects.en: procedures addressing wireless implementation and usage (including restrictions)
system configuration settings and associated documentation
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
Mechanisms authorizing independent user configuration of wireless networking capabilities
